heading: Repealed and Omitted
label: 671 Repealed and Omitted
notes: CodificationSection was a composite of provisions in acts , , and , . The provision in , which authorized President to reserve and except 12,800 acres for a permanent National Bison Range in Montana, was repealed by , , . The provision in , which directed President to reserve and except a sufficient area to enlarge the Range to not to exceed 20,000 acres, was omitted in view of the probable intent to repeal the entirety of this section by section 12(g) of div.
